title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
